items.label: Site description
items.value: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout reception-lobby example. 40 m² reception (8×5 m); 30 × LED_DOWNLIGHT at 1000 lm each in a 5-circuit zoned layout (perimeter daylight-linked + 4 interior occupancy-controlled). Photometric-analysis verifies narrow-beam downlight uniformity against BS EN 12464-1 reception_lobby target 300 lux + U₀ 0.4.

value._source: Synthetic recessed LED downlight, 1000lm, 3000K, narrow-medium beam ~70° per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical downlight. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Used to verify narrow-beam scalloping behaviour against U₀ target.
